wizard.welcome: Welcome to LF Botonera de Efectos
wizard.module_question: Do you want to enable the Dynamic Voice-overs module (Weather & Time)?
wizard.module_desc: Useful for radio stations. If you will only use sound effects, leave it off.

settings.title: Global Settings
settings.mapping_hint: Click the box and press the key you want to assign.
settings.global_keys: Allow shortcuts when the app is not focused
settings.orphaned_hint: Shortcuts assigned to buttons without audio file:
settings.about_license: Free software under the GPL-3.0 license. All software derived from this project must also be free software.
settings.about_formats: MP3 · WAV · FLAC · OGG/Vorbis · OGG/Opus · AAC · M4A · AIFF

audio_device.title: Audio output unavailable
audio_device.body: A configured audio output was not found.

mapping.banner: ✏️ MAPPING MODE: Click a Button or Tab to assign it a shortcut. (ESC to exit)

shortcuts.blocked_global: The {key} shortcut is reserved by a profile-wide shortcut and cannot be assigned here.
shortcuts.replace_button: The {key} shortcut is already assigned to button {target} in this tab. Continuing will remove it from the previous button.
shortcuts.replace_tab: The {key} shortcut is already assigned to the {target} tab. Continuing will remove it from the previous tab.
shortcuts.replace_button_any: The {key} shortcut is already assigned to button {target}. Continuing will remove it from buttons using it.
shortcuts.reserved_system: The {key} shortcut is reserved by the application and cannot be reassigned.

context_menu.color_selected: Change the colour of the selected buttons…

norm_config.title: Normalization settings
norm_config.ceiling_hint: Upper limit when normalizing by LUFS.

cue_detect.title: Automatic cue detection
cue_detect.hint: Reverse analysis avoids treating natural pauses as the end point.
cue_detect.dont_ask: Do not ask again when opening the editor
cue_detect.need_one: Enable at least start or end to use detection.

waveform_cache.title: Waveform cache
waveform_cache.hint: Stores the high-resolution waveform so tracks reopen without recalculating it. Maximum 31 days.

fade.title: Fades
fade.hint: 0 = no fade. Fades apply to all buttons.

playback_progress.hint: Controls the last audio triggered from the main buttons.

preload.enable_hint: Keeps short sounds in memory so they trigger instantly, without the delay of reading them from disk.
preload.strat_tabs: Visible tabs (and the ones you open)
preload.evict: Remove from preload after last play:
preload.dialog_intro: Preload reduces the delay when triggering sounds by keeping them in memory. You can change this anytime in Settings → Preload.

settings_loc.module_hint: Spoken time and weather announcements for radio stations. Also asked in the first-run wizard.
settings_loc.time_hint: Files: HRS00–HRS23 and MIN00–MIN59. Example: HRS14 plus MIN25 say 14:25.
settings_loc.time_hint_sharp: On the hour: HRS14_O (letter O) or HRS14_0 (zero). Both work. With no on-the-hour file, the hour and the minute are spoken.
settings_loc.weather_hint: Temperature: TMP025 or TMP25. Below zero: TMPN003 or TMP-3. Humidity: HUM082 or HUM82.
settings_loc.weather_hint_packs: ZaraRadio, Salamandra and RadioBOSS packs work with no renaming. Switching between °C and °F needs the files of the new scale.
settings_loc.err_time_disabled: The time voice-over block is disabled.
settings_loc.err_locution_folder_missing: The voice-over folder is not set or no longer exists.
settings_loc.err_no_time_locution: There is no file for this time in the chosen folder.
settings_loc.err_no_climate_locution: There is no file for the current value in the chosen folder.

edit_modal.title: Edit effect (Button
edit_modal.missing_time: Configure the time voice-over folder first.
edit_modal.missing_temperature: Configure the temperature voice-over folder first.
edit_modal.missing_humidity: Configure the humidity voice-over folder first.
edit_modal.name: Name:

playback.mode_normal: Normal — each button uses its own settings
playback.mode_overlap: Stack — buttons layer on top of each other
playback.mode_restart: Restart — re-triggers the sound on each click
playback.mode_stop_others: Solo — silences all others when a button activates
playback.boost_warning: Raising master volume above 100% can clip or distort the sound. Enable it?

updates.title: Update available
updates.body: A new version has been published.
updates.idle: Checks on startup and every 12 hours.
updates.up_to_date: You already have the latest version.

donation.title: Support this project
donation.p1: Hello, my name is Luis Fernando Velásquez. I develop this project in my free time, with the intention of creating a free, open and useful tool for everyone.
donation.p2: If LF Botonera de Efectos has been useful to you, you can support me with a voluntary donation. Every contribution helps keep the project alive and improving.
donation.p3: The software will always remain free. Donating is a way to support it, not an obligation.

delete_confirm.body_profile: Do you want to delete this profile?
delete_confirm.body_tab: Do you want to delete this tab?

fixed_panel.title: Fixed buttons
fixed_panel.delete_previous: Delete the buttons from the previous scope? OK deletes them; Cancel keeps them hidden.

console.title: Audio console
console.notice: The audio console is in testing and will move to a better place. Using it in window mode is recommended.

player.title: Player
player.many_tracks_confirm: You are about to add {count} tracks to the player. It may take a moment. Continue?
player.remember_choice: Remember my choice (do not ask again)
player.time_hint: Click to switch between elapsed and remaining time
player.save_before_clear: The current list will be cleared. Do you want to save it first?
player.save_before_open: Opening another list will clear the current one. Save it first?
player.row_hint: Double click: plays if stopped; if something is playing, marks it as next
player.settings_hint: The player is independent from the effects, so Stop All does not cut the music. Its output is chosen in Main, next to the others.
player.mode_normal: Normal (plays through the list and stops at the end)
player.mode_random: Random (at random, never repeating the current one)
player.empty_hint: Drag your songs here from the file explorer

errors.player_no_audio_found: No audio was found in what you dropped.
errors.fatal_ipc: Fatal communication error with the native engine.
errors.only_profile: The only profile cannot be deleted.
errors.only_tab: The only tab cannot be deleted.
errors.invalid_grid_size: The grid must have at least one row and one column.
errors.grid_resize_would_drop_buttons: The grid cannot be reduced because some buttons would be left outside the new size.
errors.reserved_system_shortcut: That shortcut is reserved by the application and cannot be reassigned.
errors.loc_missing_time_folder: The time voice-over folder is missing.
errors.loc_missing_climate_folder: Select at least one folder: temperature or humidity.
errors.fixed_panel_capacity_too_small: The selected limit cannot hold the existing fixed buttons.
errors.fixed_panel_full: The fixed panel reached its configured capacity.
errors.player_invalid_playlist: The file does not contain a valid playlist.
errors.player_empty_path: The track has no audio path.
